title: Lakeland Small Blue Cleaning Bucket With Soft Grip Handle 6L – Lightweight When Full Everyday Jobs
features: Useful little bucket for everyday jobs
Light enough to carry around even when full
Soft-grip handle and grip at the base for easy pouring
description: Product Description Product features Useful little bucket for everyday jobs Light enough to carry around even when full Soft-grip handle and grip at base for pouring Graduated measurements inside 6 litre capacity Buy this product from Lakeland & you can return it for up to 3 years, proof of purchase is necessary Little Blue Cleaning Bucket & Handle - 6L Just right for those everyday jobs around the home, our Little Blue Bucket is ideal for having handy around the house. Light enough to carry around even when full, the bucket has a generous 6 litre capacity which is more than enough for odd jobs such as washing the car or just carrying water. The bucket has a soft-grip handle, as well as grip at the base to help you when you’re pouring out the contents. It also has graduated measurements on the inside. Perfect for having in the cupboard ready to be called into action, our Little Blue Bucket will prove itself useful all around the home and garden. 28cm Dia. x 20cm H. (11" x 8"). 6 litre.
